title: sida galheirensis
intro: Sida galheirensis, also known as the Galheirensis sida, is a plant species in the mallow family (Malvaceae) native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Sida galheirensis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are derived from its leaves and roots. The health benefits of consuming Sida galheirensis are believed to include the reduction of fever, relief from rheumatism, and the treatment of various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Sida galheirensis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
